response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms or direct exposure to capital markets/fixed income domains, despite claiming C++ exposure only in academic or non-financial contexts (e.g., bachelor’s thesis on audio synthesis). His professional work is exclusively in JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web technologies, with no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle, investment banking systems, or Windows-based financial software development — all mandatory requirements.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated expertise in DevOps, CI/CD, and testing practices
Active open-source contributor with technical communication skills
concerns: No professional C++ on Windows — critical mandatory requirement
Zero evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
SQL experience listed but not contextualized with SQL Server/Oracle in financial systems
